channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 51 Hazelbourne - overgrown hedge, 18th April
item.description:
Reported multiple times - the hedge at 51 is still to be cut back - it’s increasing in size and is still causing a real obstruction to pavement users. This needs to be sorted as it’s been going on for years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelbourne Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge obstruction 41 Hazelbourne, 18th April
item.description:
Hedge at the above address is clearly overgrown and causing an obstruction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelbourne Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip at bike store outside 21 Hazelbourne, 18th April
item.description:
Flytip of drawers etc. been there all week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelbourne Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 18th April
item.description:
In woods, can be seen from the path through the woods

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glebe Knoll, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 18th April
item.description:
Same dog keeps defecating in front of our house. Pembury estate is just full of dog poo everywhere it is disgusting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bodney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 18th April
item.description:
Foxes keep destroying bin bags every night and this happens every morning now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Parade, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip Hazelbourne Road, 18th April
item.description:
Abandoned bin and cabinet outside 46 and 48 Hazelbourne Road. This isn’t good enough as these items have been here for weeks. Surely your street cleaning teams should report these items and deal with them accordingly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelbourne Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 161 Cricklewood Broadway, London, NW2 3HF., 18th April
item.description:
Graffiti on street bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin door hanging off, 18th April
item.description:
Door about to fall off on a car or person
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Lane, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No road sweeper has been here since Christmas . Leaves and sticks are all mashed., 18th April
item.description:
The pavement is nearly covered with covered by mashed leaves that has not been cleaned since Christmas . I took a video. But I was not able to put on . Looks very disgusting. This is at the beginning of St James’s Avenue going onto Number 1 .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway 154, 18th April
item.description:
Impassable alley at the rear of Longmeadow Road DA15 8BH this is the reshoot Bexley Council who have maintained it in the past. But needs a maintenance schedule placed on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Vincent Close, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins bags dumped, ripped open and strewn over road and footpath, 18th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped their non recyclable black bins bags on the corner of Lennard Road & Parish Lane which the foxes have torn apart and its now strewn over the pavement and road causing a hazard. Please could this be cleaned up asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No tax on car, 18th April
item.description:
The car has just been moved from Bideford Road to Sidmouth Road, needs to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign Alignment, 18th April
item.description:
The cycling route and parking advice signs on this signpost column appear to have been moved and a minor adjustment is requested to realign to face the carriageway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Mattresses dumped on Shorncliffe Road, 18th April
item.description:
Two mattresses have been dumped on the street on Shorncliffe road opposire the big Tesco. I would be very grateful if you could please arramge removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shorncliffe Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 18th April
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped on the street at 3 Tower Mill Road, SE15 6GJ. If you could please remove I would be very grateful. Thank you :-)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Mill Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest Bikes blocking pavement, 18th April
item.description:
Two Forest bikes have been abandoned on Robert street, blocking the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Robert Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please inspect this manhole cover, 18th April
item.description:
Can this manhole cover be inspected please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney Council Food Waste bin not emptied, 18th April
item.description:
The new Hackney council communal food waste bin is not working (people are walking past and putting general waste in it) and it’s not being emptied and the smell is horrendous along the street. Either facilitate regular food waste collections or remove
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hasting close fire exit side stairwells, 18th April
item.description:
We found the graffiti on staircase wall between the 2nd and 4th stairwells please paint it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Buller Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
